com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class UpdateResource

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase
      • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.UpdateResource

  • public class UpdateResource
extends FullIntegrationBase
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to update resource files of BroadPOS. The resource files can be the image of BroadPOS main page image or the EMV configuration files...
    Cross compatible with Semi and Full Integration BroadPOS apps

      static UpdateResource.UpdateResourceResponse updateResource(Context context, UpdateResource.UpdateResourceRequest request, CommSetting commSetting)
      Update resource files of BroadPOS.

    • Method Detail

      • updateResource

        public static UpdateResource.UpdateResourceResponse updateResource(Context context,
                                                                   UpdateResource.UpdateResourceRequest request,
                                                                   CommSetting commSetting)

        Update resource files of BroadPOS. The file must be a zip file. When update finished, the zip file will be unzip.

        Use case: update the image of the terminal. Idle image file’s name should be mt30_ad0.r/mt30_ad1.r/mt30_ad2.r.
        MT30 suggested image size is 480*272(width*height in pixels) and format should be 24bit bmp.
        S300 suggested image size is 240*248 and format should be 24bit bmp.
        S500 suggested image size is 320*200 and format should be 24bit bmp.
        S920 suggested image size is 240*280 and format should be png.
        SP30 suggested image size is 320*200 and format should be 24bit bmp.
        PX5/PX7 suggested image size is 800*440 and format should be png.
        A30 suggested image size is 1280*720 and format should be png.
        A60 suggested image size is 720*1280 and format should be png.
        A6650 suggested image size is 1080*2408 and format should be png.
        A77 suggested image size is 720*1440 and format should be png.
        A80 suggested image size is 480*800 and format should be png.
        A910S suggested image size is 720*1280 and format should be png.
        A920 suggested image size is 720*1280 and format should be png.
        A920 Pro suggested image size is 720*1440 and format should be png.
        A920 MAX suggested image size is 720*1480 and format should be png.
        A930 suggested image size is 720*1280 and format should be png.
        Aries6 suggested image size is 1280*720 and format should be png.
        Aries8 suggested image size is 800*1280 and format should be png.
        D190 suggested image size is 320*216 and format should be png.
        D210/D200/SP30s suggested image size is 320*200 and format should be 24bit bmp.
        D220 suggested image size is 480*760 and format should be png.
        IM20 suggested image size is 480*272 and format should be png.
        IM30 suggested image size is 720*1280 and format should be png.
        IM300 suggested image size is 320*216 and format should be png.
        Q20 suggested image size is 480*272 and format should be png.
        Q25 suggested image size is 320*216 and format should be png.
        Q30 suggested image size is 800*440 and format should be png.
        Q80 suggested image size is 480*726 and format should be png.
        M8 suggested image size is 800*1280 and format should be png.
        IM25 suggested image size is 320*480 and format should be png.
        A8700 suggested image size is 800*1280 and format should be png.
        A8500 suggested image size is 720*1280 and format should be png.
        POS expands image if size is below suggested size.

        Use case: update the emv param for full integration The file names must be what you configured on the terminal.

        This is a sync method.

        Parameters:
        context - App context
        request - The UpdateResource request.
        commSetting - Communication setting.
        Returns:
        The UpdateResource response.
